docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $898.29 FILED BY WILLIAMS, MATTHEW ADEYEMI, ANDRE AS TO DEFENDANT SPINN, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-05-2026 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, MATTHEW AS TO DEFENDANT SPINN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2026, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SPINN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-05-2026 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-05-2026 BY MURLENE J. RANDLE. PLAINTIFF MATTHEW WILLIAMS IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF ANDRE ADEYEMI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SPINN, INC. IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MURLENE J RANDLE; CLERK: N.WEBB. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-05-2026 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WILLIAMS, MATTHEW ADEYEMI, ANDRE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SPINN, INC. $898.29 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $943.29, THIS IS A DEFAULT JUDGMENT. DEFENDANT WAS SERVED BUT FAILED TO APPEAR. DAMAGES WERE SUFFICIENTLY PROVED. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
